steps.title: Classify the forest
steps.content: The passage gives two model errors: in large forests, large-mammal predictions are too high; in small forests, small-mammal predictions are too high. Tongass is explicitly a large forest, so the large-forest rule applies.

steps.title: Apply the model rule
steps.content: A applies the small-forest rule to small mammals, C introduces predator-prey relationships that are not mentioned, and D shifts to factors the model reflects rather than the stated prediction error. For Tongass, the model would overestimate large-mammal population sizes. The answer is B.
